event_description: User clicks Run to compile and execute their C++ code against the current input.
User clicks Run All to compile and execute their C++ code against all test cases.
The compile step fails with errors before execution begins.
User successfully creates a shareable link for their code.
User downloads the current editor code as a .cpp file.
User uploads a local source file and replaces the editor contents.
User triggers Clang-format to reformat the editor code.
User adds a new test case to the test case panel.
User deletes an existing test case from the test case panel.
User imports test cases from the browser extension.
Visitor clicks the primary Start Coding CTA on the landing page.
Visitor clicks the Start Coding button in the bottom CTA section.
User changes the interface language in the settings dialog.
